commands.review_summary:
The PR threads model-level `api` and `baseUrl` overrides through provider auth hook resolution and configured/inline model transport selection, with focused regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main accepts model-level `api`/`baseUrl`, but source inspection shows auth hook lookup plus fallback and inline transport selection still read provider-level values in the affected paths.
